title: ClimateSense Exit-Ticket Dataset Schema v0.1
description: Schema for student response records in the ClimateSense benchmark dataset.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this record (e.g., CS-000041).

item_id.description: Identifier for the prompt/item this response belongs to (e.g., Q01).

prompt_text.description: The full text of the exit-ticket prompt presented to the student.

response_text.description: The student's response text, as written.

expression_condition.description: Response-form condition tag (e.g., academic_standard, telegraphic_short_form, multilingual_leaning, dialectal_variety, code_switched).

gold_label_primary.description: Primary gold label: a misconception family ID (e.g., MF01_ozone_vs_greenhouse) or a non-misconception label.

gold_label_secondary.description: Optional list of additional misconception families present in the response.

gold_label_confidence_final.description: Confidence in the gold label assignment.

gold_label_method.description: How the gold label was finalized.

gold_label_adjudicated.description: Whether this record went through adjudication.

labeler_role.description: Role of the labeler(s) (e.g., project_team, educator, content_expert).

benchmark_version.description: Benchmark version this record belongs to (e.g., 0.1).

usage_restrictions.default: Formative use only; not for grading or high-stakes decisions.
